subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of him who ascended unto God! In these days when the fires of tests and the flames of trials blaze forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن متصاعد الی الله در این ایام که نیران امتحان و آتش افتتان شعله
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
